name: Killing Sun / 抗日大刀队：日军总部
short_description: "Killing Sun" is an FPS game you do not want to miss if you are a fan of "Wolfenstein 3D". If you want to shoot devils, just play this game! No need to change magazines! No recoil! The operation is simple! Now! Take your Da Dao! Massacre in 27 levels of adrenaline surge! Let the devils all die!
detailed_description:
Hey! I am a big fan of "Wolfenstein 3D" and John Romero. I made this game to show my respect to them. I have collected and studied a lot of videos and articles of John Romero, learned a lot about game design concepts, and applied them to my game. For example, horseshoe-shaped game level design.

Content

  • 27 well-designed game levels
  • 17 kinds of ferocious enemies
  • 10 kinds of expected supplies
  • 8 kinds of weapons with distinctive features
  • 3 exciting BOSS battles
  • Nearly 100 tricky secret locations

Action

  • Move – WASD
  • Fast Move - Shift + WASD
  • Switch Weapons - 1～6
  • Grenade - G

Weapons

  • Da Dao – With the strongest attack power! For close fight only.
  • Pistol – Better than nothing for a while if there are no other long-range weapons.
  • Shotgun – As an Old School FPS, how can there be no shotgun?
  • Rifle - One shot one kill!
  • Submachine gun - pit-a-pat!
  • Heavy machine guns - good spread!
  • Grenade – Boom!
  • Oil drum - Boom! Boom! Boom!

Tip

Try to find all the secret locations and you will get many surprises. This is not difficult, because the locations are all marked on the compass.
